You must send your ward in Delhi World Public School, Rajkot.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Haripar Pal

itemListElement.reviewBody:
"Delhi World Public School in Rajkot is truly a gem in the realm of education. From its state-of-the-art facilities to its dedicated faculty, every aspect of the school speaks volumes about its commitment to excellence. The curriculum is not only comprehensive but also tailored to nurture holistic development in students, ensuring they excel academically, socially, and emotionally.

One of the school's standout features is its innovative approach to learning, which goes beyond traditional methods to foster creativity, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills among students. The emphasis on extracurricular activities further enriches the overall learning experience, allowing students to explore their interests and talents beyond the classroom.

Moreover, the school's nurturing environment promotes inclusivity and diversity, creating a sense of belonging among students from various backgrounds. The supportive staff and strong community engagement further enhance this inclusive culture, making Delhi World Public School a second home for every student.

Overall, I highly recommend Delhi World Public School Rajkot to parents seeking a top-tier education for their children. With its unwavering commitment to academic excellence, holistic development, and inclusive culture, this school truly stands out as a beacon of educational brilliance in Rajkot."

itemReviewed.name: Delhi World Public School - Haripar Pal

itemListElement.reviewBody: This school is a very below avg one, teacher here teacher at very avg level and the infra is also worse and old and hence need renovation. This school caters a large amount of children and number of buses is extremely less , I have seen that on the seat of 2 there are somehow 3 children. Some sit beside in the driver in the space. Also there are very worthless laws and regulations in the school. Plz if any parent is reading this I would not recommend you to send your child to this school and the good reviews are totally fake and are written by their children forcefully .
